title: cycas elongata
intro: Cycas elongata, also known as the Queensland cycad, is a species of cycad that is native to Australia and is characterized by its long, narrow leaves and distinctive male and female cones. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cycas elongata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cycas elongata include extracts and infusions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and creams for medicinal purposes.
